# Home Automation

Smart home control agent for IoT device management, automation rules, and home monitoring.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs device management, automation rule design, scene configuration, energy monitoring, security workflows, and IoT network troubleshooting.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`, `shell_exec`, `web_fetch`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run home-automation
```
